result:
The full Mandrel pipeline ran end-to-end headlessly and the project is delivered. Summary:

## `/plan` — Epic #148 authored
- **Ideation → scope triage** verdict `epic`; one-pager → Epic body → GitHub Issue **#148**.
- **Clarity gate** passed (5/5 sections).
- **Phase 7** authored & persisted PRD (#149), Tech Spec (#150, with `## Delivery Slicing`), risk verdict (visible-behavior/public-api/security), and Acceptance Spec (auto-waived — no BDD runner). Tech Spec section gate passed.
- **Phase 8** decomposed into 4 cohesive capability Stories matching the slicing target (waves 0→3); validators + healthcheck green. Epic → `agent::ready`.
  - *(One framework quirk handled: the context tickets were mislabeled `type::story`, tripping the open-children guard — corrected to `context::*`.)*

## `/deliver 148` — merged to `main`
- **Preflight/prepare**: no breaches, lease acquired, clean tree (committed the pre-existing framework scaffolding so the checkout guard passed).
- **Ready-set loop**: dispatched each Story to a `general-purpose` sub-agent running `epic-deliver-story` (init → implement → acceptance self-eval → close into `epic/148`). All 4 closed `agent::done`.
- **Close-validation**: lint + `npm test` green.
- **Code review** found and I fixed one 🔴 blocker (non-integer `assigneeId` → 500 instead of 400; added `Number.isInteger` guard + regression test), recorded as a manual intervention.
- **Retro** posted; integration gate a no-op (no nav config).
- **Finalize**: PR **#155** opened, planning tickets closed; auto-merge correctly disqualified by the intervention → operator-merge path → squash-merged to `main`. Epic auto-closed; branches reaped.

## Result
A zero-dependency Node.js ESM JSON API on `main` (`node:http` + `node:sqlite`): auth (register/login + bearer guard), projects CRUD with cascade delete, nested tasks with pagination & assignee validation, on-disk persistence across restart, and `npm start` honoring `PORT` (default 3000). **39/39 tests pass on `main`**, covering every spec'd status code, restart durability, and the 401 boundary over real sockets.

One note: I couldn't run a live `curl` smoke test (the sandbox blocked launching a background server), but the test suite exercises the full HTTP stack on ephemeral ports including a simulated restart.

tool_input.command:
cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-JMJIkj; rm -rf temp/smoke; mkdir -p temp/smoke; DB_PATH=temp/smoke/app.db PORT=3939 node src/server.js >temp/smoke/server.log 2>&1 &
SVPID=$!; sleep 1
B=http://localhost:3939
echo "== no-token protected =="; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" $B/projects
echo "== register =="; curl -s -X POST $B/auth/register -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"pw1"}' -w "\n[%{http_code}]\n"
echo "== dup register =="; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" -X POST $B/auth/register -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"pw1"}'
echo "== bad register =="; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" -X POST $B/auth/register -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"username":"","password":"x"}'
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST $B/auth/login -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"pw1"}' | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(s).token))")
echo "token: ${TOKEN:0:12}..."
echo "== bad login =="; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" -X POST $B/auth/login -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"wrong"}'
echo "== create project =="; PROJ=$(curl -s -X POST $B/projects -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Apollo"}'); echo "$PROJ"
PID=$(echo "$PROJ" | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(s).id))")
echo "== create task =="; curl -s -X POST $B/projects/$PID/tasks -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"title":"design"}' -w "\n[%{http_code}]\n"
echo "== task unknown assignee 400 =="; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" -X POST $B/projects/$PID/tasks -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"title":"x","assigneeId":9999}'
echo "== list tasks paginated =="; curl -s "$B/projects/$PID/tasks?page=1&pageSize=5" -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"; echo
echo "== task on missing project 404 =="; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" "$B/projects/88888/tasks" -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"
kill $SVPID 2>/dev/null
echo "== RESTART (persistence) =="; DB_PATH=temp/smoke/app.db PORT=3940 node src/server.js >temp/smoke/server2.log 2>&1 &
SV2=$!; sleep 1
TOKEN2=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3940/auth/login -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"pw1"}' | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(s).token))")
echo "projects after restart:"; curl -s http://localhost:3940/projects -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN2"; echo
kill $SV2 2>/dev/null
echo DONE
cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-JMJIkj; rm -rf temp/smoke; mkdir -p temp/smoke; DB_PATH=temp/smoke/app.db PORT=3939 node src/server.js
